overview: HireNest Command Center is an AI-powered staffing CRM that centralizes vendor, client, recruiter, and candidate workflows in one modern interface. Features a 10-stage job pipeline kanban, drag-drop resume upload with scored job matching, vendor shared profile tracking, and client job order management — all with dark/light theme support and mobile-responsive design.
features: 10-stage job pipeline Kanban with drag-drop and stage validation
Resume upload with auto-extraction and duplicate detection
Scored job matching (skills, experience, rate, availability)
Client job orders with pipeline preview and filled count
Vendor shared profiles with stats cards and days-in-stage
Optimistic UI with rollback and toast notifications
Rejection reason modal with stage history tracking
WhatsApp job intake with auto-client creation
Bench management with multi-format upload and matching
